story.artifact_power: The sacred power at the heart of the shrine.
story.greeting: Pirate, your island mission begins now — listen closely.
story.act1: On Cherry Blossom Island, petals drift through the air like falling snow, covering silent temples and winding paths. Among them moves a monkey samurai, swift and precise, its blade guided by the will of Doctor Krit. It strikes without warning, guarding the island's sacred grounds. At the heart of the shrine lies the Blossom Core, the source of its power. Pirate, we must reach it, break its hold, and free the samurai before the petals fall forever.
story.act2: The monkey samurai's strikes grow faster. Every step Pirate takes through the shrine pulses with ancient energy — but the path to the Blossom Core is becoming clear.
story.act3: The Blossom Core is within reach. One final push and Doctor Krit's hold over this sacred island will be broken forever.
story.goal: Pirate, master every math trial, reach the island's core in time, and break Doctor Krit's hold.

stages.title: Romy arrives at Cherry Blossom Island
stages.mechanic_reason: Five tasks review multiplication, division and fractions together.
stages.success_message: Well done! The cherry path is clear!

rounds.title: Romy arrives at Cherry Blossom Island

stages.title: Romy gathers blossom lanterns
stages.mechanic_reason: Word problems apply multiplication, division and fractions in context.
stages.success_message: Brilliant! You solved the shrine's puzzle!

rounds.title: Romy gathers blossom lanterns
rounds.prompt: 4 trees each have 3 blossom lanterns. How many lanterns are there altogether?

rounds.title: Sharing magical flowers
rounds.prompt: 16 cherry flowers are shared equally between 4 children. How many flowers does each child get?

rounds.title: A fair mushroom picnic
rounds.prompt: A pie is shared equally between 4 friends. Romy gets one piece. What fraction of the pie does Romy get?

rounds.title: Helping the monkey village
rounds.prompt: 3 baskets each hold 6 apples. How many apples are there altogether?

rounds.title: The Blossom Core
rounds.prompt: A magical fruit is shared equally between 2 explorers. Romy gets one piece. What fraction does she get?

stages.title: The samurai tests Romy
stages.mechanic_reason: True/false checks multiplication, division and fraction facts.
stages.success_message: Sharp thinking! The samurai is impressed!

stages.title: The blossom path splits
stages.mechanic_reason: Corridor choice tests selecting the correct value for multiplication, division and fractions.

rounds.title: The blossom path splits
rounds.question: Romy gets one piece from a fruit split into 4 equal parts.

rounds.title: Sharing flowers at the shrine
rounds.question: 18 flowers are shared equally between 3 children.

rounds.title: A fruit divided at the temple
rounds.question: Romy gets one piece from a fruit split into 2 equal parts.

rounds.title: Petals in the wind
rounds.question: 24 petals are shared equally between 6 baskets.

stages.title: The Blossom Core shines brighter
stages.mechanic_reason: Fill-in-the-blank consolidates all three topics: multiplication, division and fractions.
stages.success_message: Excellent! The Blossom Core is within reach!

stages.title: Romy reaches the Blossom Core
stages.mechanic_reason: Boss stage mixes all mechanics for a final multi-skill challenge.
stages.success_message: Pirate, you've freed the samurai and broken the Blossom Core's spell!

rounds.title: Romy breaks the samurai's shield
rounds.prompt: A magical blossom is shared equally between 4 explorers. Romy gets one piece. What fraction does she get?

rounds.title: The Blossom Core starts to crack
rounds.prompt: 6 trees each have 3 glowing flowers. How many flowers are there altogether?

rounds.title: Petals swirl around the shrine
rounds.question: 12 petals are shared equally between 3 baskets.

rounds.title: The samurai's grip weakens
rounds.question: Romy gets one piece from a fruit split into 3 equal parts.
